purpose: Drive conversion at every scroll depth — CF-P8
rule: Repeat primary CTA after EVERY major section

style_definitions.primary: bg-amber-700 hover:bg-amber-800 text-white px-6 py-3 rounded-2xl font-semibold
style_definitions.secondary: border border-slate-300 bg-white hover:bg-slate-50 px-6 py-3 rounded-2xl font-semibold
style_definitions.floating: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-amber-700 text-white py-4 text-center font-semibold md:hidden

rules: Never more than 2 CTAs visible at once
Order Now = amber-700 (primary). Reserve Pickup = white/bordered (secondary)
Sticky mobile bar: md:hidden — desktop has enough visible CTAs
Final CTA section: show both options — let user choose their path
